Welcome.title: Leer Nederlands
Welcome.subtitle: Technical scaffolding in place — soft brutalism design system active.

Login.title: Welcome back
Login.subtitle: Enter the email tied to your account and we'll send a magic link to sign you back in.
Login.sentBody: We've sent you a magic link. Open it on this device to sign in.
Login.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Onboarding.welcomeTagline: Learn Dutch by actually using it — one real-life step at a time.
Onboarding.nameHelper: We'll use it to greet you — just your first name is fine.

A0.name: Just starting
A0.desc: I don't know any Dutch yet.

A1.name: Beginner
A1.desc: A few words and set phrases.

Onboarding.contextsHelper: Pick 1 to 4 — where you'll actually speak Dutch.
Onboarding.emailHelper: We'll send a magic link to finish — no password to remember.
Onboarding.sentBody: Open the magic link on this device to finish setting up.
Onboarding.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Today.title: Today
Today.weekSteps: This week: {count, plural, one {# step} other {# steps}}
Today.noChallenge: No challenge matches your setup yet — check back soon.
Today.tomorrowBody: A fresh step will be waiting.

Prepare.title: Preparation
Prepare.situationBody: A real-life moment is coming. Keep this phrase ready and try it when it feels right — no pressure.
Prepare.tip1: Say it out loud once before the moment.
Prepare.tip2: Slow and clear beats fast and perfect.
Prepare.tip3: If you blank, a smile and the key word still count.
Prepare.commitNudge: A small step — you've got this.

Validate.title: Tell me
Validate.savedHesitant: You did it, wobble and all.
Validate.savedMissed: You showed up. That's the step.

Journal.title: Journal
Journal.counter: {attempts, plural, one {# attempt} other {# attempts}} · {contexts, plural, one {# context} other {# contexts}}

Games.title: Today's games
Games.placeholder: Three short games to revisit the day.

Error.title: Something slipped
Error.body: We could not load this part of Stap. Try again.

NotFound.title: Nothing here
NotFound.body: This page does not exist (or moved).

Offline.title: Offline
Offline.body: No internet connection. Reconnect to keep learning.
